blog.title: The OO Travel Journal
blog.subtitle: Visa and relocation guides, destination notes, and practical travel logistics — from real cases, not recycled listicles.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you travel with OO Travel.
faq.q1: What services does OO Travel offer?
faq.a1: Flights, hotels, tours, visas, cruises, corporate travel, legal relocation and chauffeured car rental — arranged end to end, all in one place.
faq.q2: Which languages can I be served in?
faq.a2: Omar assists you personally in Portuguese, English, French and Arabic — no intermediaries and no call centre.
faq.q3: Can you help with visas and legal relocation abroad?
faq.a3: Yes. We prepare and guide visa applications and legal settlement paperwork alongside your flights and accommodation.
faq.a4: You receive a clear, itemised invoice and pay securely by PIX through Mercado Pago before anything is confirmed.
faq.q5: How quickly will I get a reply?
faq.a5: Message Omar on WhatsApp for a fast, personal response — usually the same day, and often within a couple of hours.
faq.q6: Is OO Travel a licensed agency?
faq.a6: Yes. OO Travel operates as a registered MEI in São Paulo (CNPJ 63.588.045/0001-49, CNAE 7911-2/00 — travel agencies).

testimonials.heading: Loved by travelers worldwide
testimonials.t1Quote: Omar arranged our flight and hotel to Dubai in record time. Flawless service from start to finish.
testimonials.t2Quote: He handled my entire visa and legal installation in Brazil. Professional, patient, and always available.
testimonials.t3Quote: A perfect Mediterranean cruise, planned down to the smallest detail. I recommend him without hesitation.

gallery.heading: Where memories are made
gallery.subtitle: Real moments from journeys we've crafted across Morocco's dunes and beyond — luxury desert camps, sunrise camel treks, and tables shared under the stars. Your story could be next.

about.title: About Omar Oukhira
about.intro: Independent travel agent in São Paulo, specialized in serving clients from Brazil and the Arab, Francophone and English-speaking worlds.
about.bio: With over a decade in the industry, Omar offers close, personalized service, accompanying every client from planning to arrival — including visa processes and legal settlement abroad.
